title: AddressGuard
description: AddressGuard is a simple Plugin which checks the IP a player is connecting from.
body:
**AddressGuard** is a simple plugin that checks the IP address of a player connecting to the server. It uses ProxyCheck to determine the type of connection the player is using.

You can configure when and with what message a player gets kicked. If your server is small enough, you don't even need an API key!
